title: Lemon Mod
body:
![A lemon with a TNT label on it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c715d4ce37371a9d6fe708639c3033172204d3b6.png)\
It adds lemons to Minecraft. It's that simple. Lemon trees generate in tropical biomes and drop lemons. Lemons can be used to craft food and "other" items. The lemons are sour though so it will take longer to eat after eating a lemon and you'll go a little blind. Also there are explosives.\
\
![A lemon tree in a jungle biome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Y8bMN5hs/images/e7e213aeba22790b902e3468e9e2d05c185d528b.png)\
![A simple house made of lemon wood](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Y8bMN5hs/images/f2ae2a6c1c940d0a857ce8aa5b7cecd5965fba84.png)\
![A landscape riddled with explosion craters](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Y8bMN5hs/images/0be241394bfdd943d6ebfdd5e940affba91c24fe.png)
